title: Notification No.15/2010-Cus(NT),dt. 17.2.2010
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 15 / 2010 - Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 17th February, 2010 28 Magha, 1931 Saka. S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs (Export Promotion), Mumbai to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on the following adjudicating authorities mentioned in column 4 of the Table below in respect of Show Cause Notices in column (2) of the said Table and their names in column (3). Table S. No. Show Cause Notices Numbers and date Party's Name Adjudication Authority as per Show Cause Notice (1) (2) (3) (4) 1 SG/MISC-115/DC/2003 SIIB(X)/S/10- 02/KAP/CC(EP)/06/SIIB(X) dated 20.6.2006 Hazel Mercantile Nitin Kumar Rajiv Verma Commissioner of Customs (Export Promotion), New Custom House, Mumbai 2 Addendum dated 10.3.2008 Same as above As above 3 S/10-10/Gr.VII/07-08 dated 3.4.2008 M/s Hazel Mercantile M/s Hemjot Agency Additional Commissioner of Customs (Gr.VII), Kandla 4 VIII/10-04/Commr./O&A/08 M/s Hindalco, Bharuch Commissioner of Customs, Ahmedabad 5 Addendum dated 29.5.08 As Above As Above 6 SG/MISC-93/2008 SIIB(I) dated 13.6.2008 Hazel Mercantile Nitin Kumar Commissioner of Customs (Import), JNCH -- 1 of 2 -- Rajiv Verma 7 SG/MISC-93/2008 SIIB(I) dated 13.6.2008 M/s India Fin Trade Joint Commissioner of Customs, SIIB(I), JNCH 8 SG/MISC-167/DC/2003 SIIB(X)/S/10-Commr. 01/CC(EP)/08/SIIB(X) dated 26.5.2008 M/s Veritas Nitin Kumar, Rajiv Verma, CHA Samir Sanghvi Commissioner of Customs (EP), NCH, Mumbai 9 Addended dated 16.2.09 As above & M/s Sanman Trad Impex As above 10 VIII/10-07/Commr./O&A/08 dated 27.6.08 M/s Hindalco In Bharauch Commissioner of Customs, Ahmedabad 11 SG/MISC-203/2008 SIIB(I) dated 21.7.2008 M/s Veritas Nitin Kumar Rajiv Verma Commissioner of Customs (Import), JNCH 12 SG/MISC-203/2008 SIIB(I) dated 21.7.2008 M/s Veritas Nitin Kumar Rajiv Verma Commissioner of Customs (Import), JNCH for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s. Hazel Mercantile Private Limited and M/s Veritas Exports (a division of Sanman Trade Impex), issued by the Special Intelligence and Investigation Branch (Export), New Custom House, Mumbai. [F.No. 437/95/2009-Cus.IV] (Navraj Goyal) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 2 of 2 --
